title: Ubiquiti UVC-AI-Pro - UVC AI Professional camera, 8MP, White
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / IP cameras / Bullet
description: The Ubiquiti AI Pro camera can be used outdoors or indoors as needed. The camera has a high 4K resolution (8 MP) and a lens with up to 3x zoom. The IR LED can illuminate an area over a long distance (up to 25 meters). The camera also includes algorithms for license plate reading or person detection. Power supply is solved by PoE+. It also offers two-way audio (microphone and speaker) High resolution up to 4K 3x zoom IR range up to 25 meters Advanced features such as license plate reading or person detection Two-way audio With the Unifi Protect mobile app, you can monitor live video on all cameras connected to the NVR. The app is available for iOS and Android platforms Device Mounting bracket + screws
